queries.question: Show me the names of gate agents and pilots who speak Japanese.
queries.sql:
SELECT GateAgents.name
FROM Languages JOIN GateAgents ON Languages.id = GateAgents.speaksId
WHERE Languages.language = "Japanese"
UNION
SELECT Pilots.name
FROM Languages JOIN Pilots ON Languages.id = Pilots.speaksId
WHERE Languages.language = "Japanese"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?languages a :Languages .
    ?gateagents a :GateAgents .
    ?gateagents p:hasLanguages_speaksId ?languages .
    ?gateagents p:name ?name .
    ?languages p:language ?language_f .
    FILTER(STR(?language_f) = "Japanese")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?languages a :Languages .
    ?pilots a :Pilots .
    ?pilots p:hasLanguages_speaksId ?languages .
    ?pilots p:name ?name .
    ?languages p:language ?language_f .
    FILTER(STR(?language_f) = "Japanese")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}
